items.title: Brad Holmes: I've always been a big fan of Isiah Pacheco from afar
items.summary: Running back Isiah Pacheco is known for his aggressive style, often described as someone who runs as if he's angry at the ground.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Mourinho in final negotiations to become Real boss
items.summary: Jose Mourinho is in final negotiations to become Real Madrid's next head coach, 13 years after his first spell at the Bernabeu.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: What prompted Shabnim Ismail's retirement u-turn?
items.summary: South Africa have made two World Cup finals since Ismail's international retirement, but now she's back as they look to go one step further
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
